description: Creates a filled 3D angle sector (pie slice) showing the angle between two rays
utility: Draw a filled angle sector by specifying vertex and two points defining the angle

arguments.name: vertex_x
arguments.description: X coordinate of the sector vertex

arguments.name: vertex_y
arguments.description: Y coordinate of the sector vertex

arguments.name: vertex_z
arguments.description: Z coordinate of the sector vertex

arguments.name: point1_x
arguments.description: X coordinate of the first ray endpoint

arguments.name: point1_y
arguments.description: Y coordinate of the first ray endpoint

arguments.name: point1_z
arguments.description: Z coordinate of the first ray endpoint

arguments.name: point2_x
arguments.description: X coordinate of the second ray endpoint

arguments.name: point2_y
arguments.description: Y coordinate of the second ray endpoint

arguments.name: point2_z
arguments.description: Z coordinate of the second ray endpoint

alternates.syntax: sector3d(graph, vertex_x, vertex_y, vertex_z, point1_x, point1_y, point1_z, point2_x, point2_y, point2_z, radius)
alternates.description: Specify a custom radius for the sector (default is computed from point distances)
Use point3d expressions instead of separate coordinates
